global.description: The ad features a dark background with a prominent logo and clear messaging.
global.main_message: Promoting a financial service with no hidden fees.

elements.label: dark background
elements.description: A solid dark background that fills the entire canvas, providing contrast for the foreground elements.

elements.label: CoinBridge logo
elements.description: A stylized logo featuring geometric shapes, including a circle and a rectangle, in a light color against the dark background.

elements.label: abstract shapes
elements.description: An arrangement of abstract shapes, including circles and rectangles, in a light color that adds visual interest.

elements.label: small circle
elements.description: A small light-colored circle positioned towards the center of the ad, adding a decorative touch.

elements.label: small rectangle
elements.description: A small light-colored rectangle positioned near the bottom center, complementing the other shapes.

elements.label: main message text
elements.description: Bold, white text stating 'Your money, clearer No hidden fees' positioned centrally for emphasis.
elements.text_content: Your money, clearer No hidden fees

elements.label: CoinBridge headline
elements.description: A prominent headline in white text that reads 'CoinBridge', located at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Claim reward button
elements.description: A call-to-action button with the text 'Claim reward' in white, positioned at the bottom of the ad.

embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is at the top, the logo is centered, and the CTA is at the bottom.
